name: Clas Ohlson AB (publ)
summary: Clas Ohlson AB (publ) operates as a retailing company in Sweden and internationally. It offers hardware, electrical, multimedia, home, and leisure products, as well as spare parts and accessories. The company sells its products through its stores and online shopping. As of April 30, 2020, it operated approximately 228 stores including 97 in Sweden, 90 in Norway, 40 in Finland, and one in the United Kingdom. Clas Ohlson AB (publ) was founded in 1918 and is headquartered in Insj√É¬∂n, Sweden.
